description: Baseline: analyze smartroom log with cached index

asi.hypothesis: baseline measurement

description: Pre-compile regex, skip fuzzy for short messages

asi.hypothesis: pre-compile regex at Locator init, skip fuzzy for short messages

description: Keyword-based filtering to skip irrelevant log sites

asi.hypothesis: keyword-based filtering: extract keywords from template and message, skip log sites with no shared keywords

description: Jaccard similarity - broke test correctness

asi.hypothesis: replace SequenceMatcher with Jaccard word similarity for speed
asi.rollback_reason: test_template_matching failed: Jaccard gave 0.6 instead of >0.7
asi.next_action_hint: revert similarity change, keep keyword filtering

description: Hybrid similarity: fast path for obvious cases, SequenceMatcher fallback

asi.hypothesis: hybrid similarity: fast length check, word overlap for high similarity, SequenceMatcher fallback

description: Function name matching: use word set lookup instead of substring

asi.hypothesis: extract words from haystack into set, use set membership instead of substring search

description: Function name index for traceback - no improvement

asi.hypothesis: build function name index for fast traceback matching
asi.rollback_reason: slower than previous (12,517ms vs 10,081ms)
asi.next_action_hint: traceback matching is not the bottleneck, revert

description: More aggressive keyword filtering: threshold 15→10 chars

asi.hypothesis: lower keyword filtering threshold from 15 to 10 chars for more aggressive filtering

description: Function name index for traceback matching - no improvement

asi.hypothesis: build function name index at init to avoid iterating all functions for each traceback frame
asi.rollback_reason: slower than previous best (2708ms vs 2680ms), index overhead outweighs benefits for this workload
asi.next_action_hint: try optimizing message keyword extraction instead

description: Replace regex keyword extraction with split-based approach for faster message keyword extraction

asi.hypothesis: use split() and isalnum() instead of regex for keyword extraction
asi.key_change: replaced re.findall() with msg_lower.split() and isalnum() filter

description: Build function name and module indexes at init for O(1) lookups instead of iterating all functions

asi.hypothesis: pre-build indexes mapping function names and module names to function IDs for O(1) lookup
asi.key_change: replaced iteration over all 1640 functions with dictionary lookups using _func_name_to_fids and _module_to_fids indexes

description: Add qualname and filename indexes for structured evidence and traceback matching - avoid iterating all functions

asi.hypothesis: use pre-built indexes (_func_qualname_to_fids, _filename_to_fids) to avoid O(n) iteration through all functions for structured evidence and traceback matching
asi.key_change: replaced iteration over all functions with O(1) index lookups using qualname and filename indexes

description: Revert inverted index for log sites - performance regression from 895ms to 49,583ms

asi.hypothesis: use inverted index (keyword -> log sites) to find candidate log sites instead of iterating all sites
asi.rollback_reason: severe performance regression: 895ms -> 49,583ms (55x slower). Set operations and index building overhead outweigh benefits
asi.next_action_hint: revert to previous approach, try different optimization

description: Make keyword filtering more aggressive by lowering threshold from 10 to 5 chars

asi.hypothesis: lower keyword filtering threshold from 10 to 5 chars to skip more log sites early
asi.key_change: changed len(site.template) > 10 to len(site.template) > 5 in keyword filter

description: Use split() instead of regex for hay_words - coverage drop from 709 to 521

asi.hypothesis: use split() instead of regex for building hay_words set
asi.rollback_reason: matched_lines dropped from 709 to 521 (27% coverage loss). split() doesn't handle non-ASCII characters the same way as regex pattern [a-z\u4e00-\u9fff]
asi.next_action_hint: revert to regex approach, try different optimization

description: Add log level filtering before keyword filter - made things slower (834ms vs 736ms)

asi.hypothesis: add log level filtering before keyword filter to skip incompatible sites early
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 736ms -> 834ms. The overhead of checking log levels for every site outweighs the benefit of skipping some sites
asi.next_action_hint: try different approach - maybe optimize the main loop iteration itself

description: Pre-build log site to function mapping to avoid repeated lookups in main loop

asi.hypothesis: pre-build a mapping from log site ID to function object to avoid repeated dictionary lookups in the main matching loop
asi.key_change: added self._site_to_function dict that maps log site IDs directly to function objects, eliminating the need to call self.index.functions.get(site.function_id) for every log site

description: Replace set intersection with substring check for keyword filtering - made things slower

asi.hypothesis: replace set intersection keyword filtering with substring check using any(kw in msg_lower for kw in site_kw)
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 683ms -> 1549ms (2.3x slower). Substring matching is slower than set operations
asi.next_action_hint: revert to set intersection approach, try different optimization

description: Reduce keyword filtering threshold from 5 to 3 chars to skip more log sites early

asi.hypothesis: reduce keyword filtering threshold from 5 to 3 chars to apply filter to more log sites
asi.key_change: changed len(site.template) > 5 to len(site.template) > 3 in keyword filter

description: Replace set comprehension with explicit loop for message keyword extraction

asi.hypothesis: replace set comprehension with explicit loop and add() for message keyword extraction
asi.key_change: changed from set comprehension to explicit loop with add() to avoid intermediate list creation

description: Increase fuzzy matching threshold from 10 to 15 chars - made things slower

asi.hypothesis: increase fuzzy matching threshold from 10 to 15 chars to reduce fuzzy matching attempts
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 666ms -> 824ms (24% slower). Counterintuitive - expected less fuzzy matching to be faster
asi.next_action_hint: revert and try different approach

description: Pre-build combined site info tuple to reduce dictionary lookups in main loop

asi.hypothesis: pre-build combined site_info tuple containing (function, compiled_regex, keywords, template_len) to reduce dictionary lookups from 3 to 1 per log site
asi.key_change: created self._site_info dict that stores all needed info for each log site in a single tuple, eliminating repeated lookups for function, compiled regex, keywords, and template length

description: Replace regex with split-based hay_words extraction - coverage loss

asi.hypothesis: use split() and strip() instead of regex for hay_words extraction
asi.rollback_reason: matched_lines dropped from 709 to 583 (18% coverage loss). Split-based approach doesn't handle non-ASCII characters correctly like regex does
asi.next_action_hint: revert to regex approach, try different optimization

description: Optimize context boost: avoid list() copy and set union, iterate callers/callees separately

asi.hypothesis: optimize context boost by avoiding list(scores.items()) copy and set union operation, iterate through callers and callees separately with early break
asi.key_change: removed list() wrapper around scores.items(), replaced set union with separate iterations through callers and callees with early break on first match

description: Optimize similarity word overlap calculation - no improvement

asi.hypothesis: optimize similarity function by splitting words only once and adding quick length check before set creation
asi.rollback_reason: no meaningful improvement: 546.59ms -> 546.71ms (within noise)
asi.next_action_hint: try different optimization approach

description: Iterate directly over site_info.items() instead of looking up by lid

asi.hypothesis: iterate directly over self._site_info.items() instead of iterating log_sites and looking up site_info by lid
asi.key_change: changed from 'for lid, site in self.index.log_sites.items(): site_info = self._site_info.get(lid)' to 'for lid, site_info in self._site_info.items(): site = self.index.log_sites[lid]'

description: Include site object in site_info tuple to eliminate dictionary lookup

asi.hypothesis: include site object in site_info tuple to avoid looking it up from index.log_sites
asi.key_change: changed site_info tuple from (fn, compiled, keywords, template_len) to (fn, compiled, keywords, template_len, site)

description: Pre-compile keyword extraction pattern for faster initialization

asi.hypothesis: pre-compile keyword extraction regex pattern once instead of using re.findall() which recompiles each time
asi.key_change: added keyword_pattern = re.compile(r'[A-Za-z\u4e00-\u9fff]{4,}') and used keyword_pattern.findall() instead of re.findall()

description: Pre-compile haystack word extraction pattern - no improvement

asi.hypothesis: pre-compile haystack word extraction regex pattern to avoid recompilation
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 477ms -> 489ms (2.5% slower). Attribute access overhead outweighs any benefit
asi.next_action_hint: revert and try different optimization

description: Iterate directly over regex matches instead of creating set - no improvement

asi.hypothesis: iterate directly over regex matches instead of creating a set for hay_words
asi.rollback_reason: no meaningful improvement: 477.907ms -> 477.965ms (within noise). Set creation overhead is negligible
asi.next_action_hint: try different optimization approach

description: Include more site attributes in site_info tuple - made things slower

asi.hypothesis: include template, level, function_id, line in site_info tuple to avoid attribute accesses
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 477ms -> 496ms (4% slower). Tuple unpacking overhead outweighs benefit of avoiding attribute accesses
asi.next_action_hint: revert and try different optimization

description: Cache entry_level_lower before loop - made things slower

asi.hypothesis: cache entry.level.lower() before loop to avoid repeated calls
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 477ms -> 504ms (5.5% slower). Additional variable and conditional check overhead outweighs benefit
asi.next_action_hint: revert and try different optimization

description: Remove repr strings from reason messages - no improvement

asi.hypothesis: remove f-string repr formatting from reason messages to avoid string operations
asi.rollback_reason: no meaningful improvement: 477.907ms -> 477.901ms (within noise). String formatting overhead is negligible
asi.next_action_hint: try different optimization approach

description: Use simpler data structures during matching, create Candidates at end - made things slower

asi.hypothesis: use simple dicts during matching loop and create Candidate objects only at the end
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 477ms -> 481ms (0.7% slower). Overhead of multiple dicts and final Candidate creation outweighs benefit
asi.next_action_hint: revert and try different optimization

description: Reorder keyword filter conditions - no improvement

asi.hypothesis: check template_len first before set intersection for faster short-circuit
asi.rollback_reason: no meaningful improvement: 477ms -> 478ms (within noise). Condition reordering doesn't help
asi.next_action_hint: try different optimization approach

description: Use isdisjoint() instead of set intersection for keyword filtering

asi.hypothesis: use set.isdisjoint() instead of not (set1 & set2) for faster keyword filtering
asi.key_change: replaced 'not (site_kw & msg_keywords)' with 'site_kw.isdisjoint(msg_keywords)' which short-circuits on first common element

description: Reorder keyword filter to check template_len first

asi.hypothesis: check template_len before set operations for faster short-circuit
asi.key_change: moved template_len > 3 check to the beginning of the condition

description: Pre-compute lowercase template and level values

asi.hypothesis: pre-compute template_lower and level_lower during initialization to avoid repeated .lower() calls in hot loop
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 431.27ms -> 464.36ms (7.7% slower). Overhead of storing and unpacking larger tuples outweighs benefit of avoiding .lower() calls
asi.next_action_hint: try optimizing similarity function or reducing iteration space instead

description: Cache site attributes in local variables

asi.hypothesis: cache site.template, site.level, site.function_id, site.line in local variables to reduce attribute lookups
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 431.27ms -> 542.37ms (25.7% slower). Overhead of creating local variables outweighs benefit of avoiding attribute lookups
asi.next_action_hint: try caching entry-level attributes or optimizing similarity function

description: Cache entry_level_lower before loop

asi.hypothesis: cache entry.level.lower() before loop to avoid repeated calls
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 431.27ms -> 438.90ms (1.8% slower). Overhead of variable assignment and conditional check outweighs benefit
asi.next_action_hint: try optimizing msg_keywords extraction with set comprehension

description: Use set comprehension for msg_keywords extraction

asi.hypothesis: replace explicit loop with set comprehension for msg_keywords extraction
asi.rollback_reason: no meaningful improvement: 431.27ms -> 431.78ms (within noise). Set comprehension overhead similar to explicit loop
asi.next_action_hint: try reducing fuzzy matching calls or optimizing similarity function

description: Increase fuzzy matching threshold from 10 to 15 chars

asi.hypothesis: increase fuzzy matching threshold to reduce expensive similarity calls
asi.key_change: changed fuzzy matching condition from 'len(msg) > 10 and template_len > 10' to 'len(msg) > 15 and template_len > 15'

description: Add length check before similarity calculation

asi.hypothesis: add quick length difference check before expensive similarity calculation
asi.key_change: added 'len_diff < max(len(msg), template_len) * 0.5' check before calling similarity()

description: Cache entry.level.lower() before loop

asi.hypothesis: cache entry.level.lower() before loop to avoid repeated calls
asi.key_change: added entry_level_lower = entry.level.lower() if entry.level else None before loop, used in condition

description: Pre-compute site.level.lower() in site_info tuple

asi.hypothesis: pre-compute site.level.lower() during initialization and store in site_info tuple
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 334.92ms -> 352.43ms (5.2% slower). Overhead of storing and unpacking extra tuple element outweighs benefit
asi.next_action_hint: try different optimization approach

description: Use set comprehension for msg_keywords

asi.hypothesis: replace explicit loop with set comprehension for msg_keywords extraction
asi.rollback_reason: no meaningful improvement: 334.92ms -> 335.68ms (0.2% slower, within noise). Set comprehension overhead similar to explicit loop
asi.next_action_hint: try different optimization approach

description: Cache entry.logger to avoid repeated attribute access

asi.hypothesis: cache entry.logger in local variable to avoid repeated attribute access
asi.rollback_reason: no meaningful improvement: 334.92ms -> 336.25ms (0.4% slower, within noise). Attribute access overhead is negligible
asi.next_action_hint: try pre-computing site.level.lower() during initialization

description: Pre-compute site.level.lower() in site_info tuple

asi.hypothesis: pre-compute site.level.lower() during initialization and store in site_info tuple
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 334.92ms -> 340.69ms (1.7% slower). Overhead of storing and unpacking extra tuple element outweighs benefit
asi.next_action_hint: try caching entry.logger to avoid repeated attribute access

description: Cache entry.logger to avoid repeated attribute access

asi.hypothesis: cache entry.logger in local variable to avoid repeated attribute access
asi.key_change: added entry_logger = entry.logger before loop, used in condition

description: Pre-compute site_level_prefix in site_info tuple

asi.hypothesis: pre-compute site.level.lower()[:4] during initialization and store in site_info tuple
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 332.60ms -> 351.77ms (5.8% slower). Overhead of storing and unpacking extra tuple element outweighs benefit
asi.next_action_hint: try different optimization approach

description: Cache site.template in local variable

asi.hypothesis: cache site.template in local variable to avoid repeated attribute access
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 332.60ms -> 352.95ms (6.1% slower). Overhead of creating local variable outweighs benefit
asi.next_action_hint: try different optimization approach

description: Cache msg_words and add word overlap check before similarity

asi.hypothesis: cache msg_words before loop and add word overlap check before calling expensive similarity function
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 332.60ms -> 335.12ms (0.8% slower). Overhead of word overlap calculation outweighs benefit
asi.next_action_hint: try different optimization approach

description: Reduce fuzzy matching threshold from 15 to 12 chars

asi.hypothesis: reduce fuzzy matching threshold from 15 to 12 chars to allow more fuzzy matching attempts
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 332.60ms -> 338.09ms (1.6% slower). More fuzzy matching calls outweigh any benefit
asi.next_action_hint: try different optimization approach

description: Add fast path for identical strings in fuzzy matching

asi.hypothesis: add fast path to skip similarity calculation when normalized message equals template
asi.key_change: check if msg_normalized == site.template before calling similarity(), use sim=1.0 if identical

description: Pre-compile regex from template for sites without regex

asi.hypothesis: pre-compile regex from template during initialization for sites without pre-existing regex
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 331.53ms -> 338.13ms (2% slower). Overhead of compiling more regex patterns during init outweighs benefit
asi.next_action_hint: try different optimization approach

description: Add fast path to skip SequenceMatcher when word overlap < 0.5

asi.hypothesis: skip expensive SequenceMatcher call when word overlap is below 0.5
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 331.53ms -> 335.17ms (1.1% slower). The additional overlap check adds overhead without sufficient benefit
asi.next_action_hint: try caching canonical forms during initialization

description: Cache canonical forms during initialization for similarity calculations

asi.hypothesis: pre-compute and cache canonical forms for all templates during initialization to avoid recomputing them in similarity()
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 331.53ms -> 338.93ms (2.2% slower). Dictionary lookup overhead outweighs benefit of avoiding canonical form computation
asi.next_action_hint: try caching message canonical form instead, or optimize the canonical_for_similarity function itself

description: Pre-compile regex patterns in canonical_for_similarity

asi.hypothesis: pre-compile regex patterns used in canonical_for_similarity to avoid repeated compilation
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 331.53ms -> 336.15ms (1.4% slower). Pattern compilation overhead already handled by Python's re module caching
asi.next_action_hint: try optimizing normalize_text function or reducing number of regex substitutions

description: Pre-compile whitespace regex pattern in normalize_text

asi.hypothesis: pre-compile whitespace regex pattern in normalize_text to avoid repeated compilation
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 331.53ms -> 332.82ms (0.4% slower). Pattern compilation overhead already handled by Python's re module caching
asi.next_action_hint: try reducing number of regex substitutions in canonical_for_similarity or optimize template_to_regex

description: Make keyword filter more aggressive by lowering threshold from 3 to 2

asi.hypothesis: lower keyword filter threshold from 3 to 2 to apply filter to more sites
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 331.53ms -> 335.39ms (1.2% slower). More sites being filtered adds overhead without sufficient benefit
asi.next_action_hint: try increasing threshold instead to skip filter for more sites

description: Add level filter before keyword filter

asi.hypothesis: add level filter before keyword filter to skip sites where level doesn't match
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 331.53ms -> 348.15ms (5% slower). Additional filter check adds overhead without sufficient benefit
asi.next_action_hint: try removing the level check from inside the matched block to avoid duplicate checks

description: Replace regex whitespace normalization with split/join in normalize_text

asi.hypothesis: use split() and join() instead of re.sub for whitespace normalization
asi.key_change: replaced re.sub(r"\s+", " ", text.strip()) with " ".join(text.split())

description: Cache canonical forms and word sets, inline similarity calculation

asi.hypothesis: cache canonical forms and word sets during initialization, inline similarity calculation to avoid function call overhead
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 326.76ms -> 336.85ms (3.1% slower). Dictionary lookup overhead and complex inline logic outweigh function call savings
asi.next_action_hint: try simpler optimizations like reducing attribute access or optimizing the main loop

description: Use set comprehension for keyword extraction

asi.hypothesis: use set comprehension instead of loop with add() for keyword extraction
asi.rollback_reason: no meaningful improvement: 326.76ms -> 326.61ms (0.05% faster, within noise)
asi.next_action_hint: try caching site attributes in local variables at loop start to reduce attribute access

description: Cache site attributes in local variables at loop start

asi.hypothesis: cache site.template, site.level, site.function_id, site.line in local variables at loop start to reduce attribute access
asi.rollback_reason: performance regression: 326.76ms -> 397.99ms (21.8% slower). Overhead of creating local variables outweighs any benefit from reduced attribute access
asi.next_action_hint: try optimizing the similarity function or reducing the number of log sites checked

description: Add fast path to normalize_text for already-normalized strings

asi.hypothesis: add fast path to normalize_text that checks if string is already normalized before doing split/join
asi.rollback_reason: no meaningful improvement: 326.76ms -> 327.33ms (0.2% slower, within noise). The fast path check adds overhead that outweighs any benefit
asi.next_action_hint: try caching compiled regex patterns in template_matches to avoid repeated compilation

description: Cache compiled regex patterns in template_matches using lru_cache

asi.hypothesis: cache compiled regex patterns in template_matches using lru_cache to avoid repeated compilation
asi.rollback_reason: no meaningful improvement: 326.76ms -> 328.62ms (0.6% slower, within noise). Cache lookup overhead may outweigh compilation savings for frequently used patterns
asi.next_action_hint: try optimizing log parser or indexer instead of locator
